languages.text: "Ты трус, Эоганн. Ты калечишь свою память годами и тянешь время бессмысленными опытами, пока твой друг страдает. Хватит. Возьми ответственность. Вернись к Нунциусу и отпусти его".

"You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."
languages.original_text: "Ты трус, Эоганн. Ты калечишь свою память годами и тянешь время бессмысленными опытами, пока твой друг страдает. Хватит. Возьми ответственность. Вернись к Нунциусу и отпусти его".

traits.locale_text: "You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

"You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

"You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

languages.text: «Es usted un cobarde, Eogunn. Lleva años mutilando su propia memoria, intentando ganar tiempo con experimentos inservibles mientras su amigo sufre. Basta ya. Responsabilícese. Vuelva con Nuncius y libérelo».
languages.original_text: "You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

traits.locale_text: «Es usted un cobarde, Eogunn. Lleva años mutilando su propia memoria, intentando ganar tiempo con experimentos inservibles mientras su amigo sufre. Basta ya. Responsabilícese. Vuelva con Nuncius y libérelo».

languages.text: “你是个懦夫，伊奥贡。多年来，你一直粗暴抹除自己的记忆，用毫无意义的实验拖延时间，任由你的朋友受苦。够了，是时候负起责任，回到努恩修斯身边，让他解脱了。”
languages.original_text: "You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

traits.locale_text: “你是个懦夫，伊奥贡。多年来，你一直粗暴抹除自己的记忆，用毫无意义的实验拖延时间，任由你的朋友受苦。够了，是时候负起责任，回到努恩修斯身边，让他解脱了。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes un lâche, Eogunn. Depuis des années, vous massacrez votre propre mémoire et essayez de retarder l'inévitable en menant de vaines expériences pendant que votre ami souffre. Ça suffit. Assumez la responsabilité de vos actes. Retournez auprès de Nuncius et laissez-le partir. »
languages.original_text: "You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes un lâche, Eogunn. Depuis des années, vous massacrez votre propre mémoire et essayez de retarder l'inévitable en menant de vaines expériences pendant que votre ami souffre. Ça suffit. Assumez la responsabilité de vos actes. Retournez auprès de Nuncius et laissez-le partir. »

languages.text: "Korkağın tekisin Eogunn. Yıllardır kendi hafızanı yok ediyor ve arkadaşın acı çekerken anlamsız deneylerle zaman kazanıyorsun. Yeter. Sorumluluk al. Nuncius'a dön ve onu özgür bırak."
languages.original_text: "You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

traits.locale_text: "Korkağın tekisin Eogunn. Yıllardır kendi hafızanı yok ediyor ve arkadaşın acı çekerken anlamsız deneylerle zaman kazanıyorsun. Yeter. Sorumluluk al. Nuncius'a dön ve onu özgür bırak."

languages.text: "Ihr seid ein Feigling, Eogunn. Ihr habt jahrelang Eure eigene Erinnerung geopfert und mit sinnlosen Experimenten Zeit vergeudet, während Euer Freund leidet. Es reicht. Übernehmt Verantwortung. Kehrt zu Nuncius zurück und lasst ihn gehen."
languages.original_text: "You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid ein Feigling, Eogunn. Ihr habt jahrelang Eure eigene Erinnerung geopfert und mit sinnlosen Experimenten Zeit vergeudet, während Euer Freund leidet. Es reicht. Übernehmt Verantwortung. Kehrt zu Nuncius zurück und lasst ihn gehen."

languages.text: 「お前は臆病者だ、エオガン。何年もの間、あなたは自分の記憶を消し、友人を苦しめている間、無意味な実験で時間稼ぎをしてきた。もういい。責任を取れ。ヌンキウスに戻り、彼を解放しなさい」
languages.original_text: "You are a coward, Eogunn. For years, you have been butchering your own memory and stalling for time with pointless experiments while your friend suffers. Enough. Take responsibility. Return to Nuncius and let him go."

traits.locale_text: 「お前は臆病者だ、エオガン。何年もの間、あなたは自分の記憶を消し、友人を苦しめている間、無意味な実験で時間稼ぎをしてきた。もういい。責任を取れ。ヌンキウスに戻り、彼を解放しなさい」
